response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent relevant work in TypeScript/Node.js at re:cinq including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that directly matches the JD's AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, C++, Python-adjacent via DLang), MongoDB/AWS exposure from Optilyz, and demonstrated craftsmanship via TDD/CI practice at RIDE. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js, React depth, and PostgreSQL, but the trajectory and breadth make this a clear interview.
strengths: Recent TypeScript/Node.js + AI agent and MCP work directly matches the role
15+ years full-stack across web, mobile, desktop, embedded; deep polyglot range
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in stack or projects
React depth unclear; frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js
PostgreSQL not mentioned; database experience skews to MongoDB and MySQL

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited React signal
